cinewolf.panel.title: CineWolf AutoDirector
cinewolf.target.unavailable: Target is not available at the current replay time
cinewolf.timeline.clamped_to_end: Duration was shortened to the end of the replay
cinewolf.conflict.summary: The interval contains %s camera keyframe(s) and %s FOV keyframe(s).
cinewolf.conflict.default_cancel: Cancel is the safe default. Add creates separate CineWolf tracks; Replace removes only camera/FOV keyframes inside this interval.
cinewolf.error.select_target: Select an available replay entity first
cinewolf.error.duration: Duration must be greater than zero
cinewolf.error.timeline_unavailable: The requested timeline interval is unavailable
cinewolf.error.sample_limit: The preview would exceed the safe limit of %s samples
cinewolf.error.no_flashback_selection: No entity is selected in Flashback
cinewolf.error.no_crosshair_target: No entity is under the crosshair
cinewolf.error.no_spectated_target: The camera is not spectating an entity
cinewolf.write.editor_unavailable: The Flashback editor state is unavailable.
cinewolf.write.conflicts: Generation was cancelled because timeline conflicts still exist.
cinewolf.write.two_ticks: At least two distinct replay ticks are required.
cinewolf.write.success: Inserted %s camera and %s FOV keyframes on editable native Flashback tracks.
cinewolf.write.failed: Flashback could not write the generated keyframes.
cinewolf.undo.unavailable: No unchanged CineWolf shot is available to undo in this scene.
cinewolf.undo.timeline_changed: The timeline changed after generation; use native Flashback Undo if appropriate.
cinewolf.undo.tracks_changed: The generated CineWolf tracks changed or were removed, so guarded undo was not applied.
cinewolf.undo.success: The timeline state from before the last CineWolf shot was restored.
cinewolf.tooltip.target: Stable entity UUID used to resolve the replay target after time jumps and entity recreation.
cinewolf.tooltip.target_flashback_select: Uses the entity currently selected in Flashback as the camera target.
cinewolf.tooltip.target_crosshair: Uses the replay entity currently under the crosshair as the camera target.
cinewolf.tooltip.target_spectated: Uses the entity currently spectated by the replay camera as the camera target.
cinewolf.tooltip.diameter: Full orbit diameter in blocks. Radius is diameter divided by two.
cinewolf.tooltip.height: Vertical camera offset above the target position, in blocks.
cinewolf.tooltip.distance: Camera offset from the target or flyby framing distance, in blocks.
cinewolf.tooltip.start_distance: Initial wide framing distance, in blocks.
cinewolf.tooltip.end_distance: Final close framing distance. Minimum is one block.
cinewolf.tooltip.rpm: Orbit rotations per minute. The target can move while the orbit follows it.
cinewolf.tooltip.duration: Shot duration in seconds when no Flashback In/Out range is selected.
cinewolf.tooltip.duration_range: Duration comes from the selected Flashback In/Out timeline range.
cinewolf.tooltip.start_angle: Initial orbit angle in degrees around the target.
cinewolf.tooltip.direction: Orbit rotation or flyby travel direction.
cinewolf.tooltip.camera_speed: Follow responsiveness or flyby travel speed. It never changes replay playback speed.
cinewolf.tooltip.fov: Native Flashback field of view in degrees, from 1 to 110.
cinewolf.tooltip.easing: Motion timing curve. Unsupported native curves are baked into simplified linear samples.
cinewolf.tooltip.look_ahead: Aims at the target pose this many seconds ahead for more natural framing.
cinewolf.tooltip.collision_avoidance: Checks camera clearance against the replay world at each sampled source time.
cinewolf.tooltip.path_smoothing_enabled: Smooths camera position and rotation before keyframes are simplified. Shot boundaries, teleports, and collision-constrained samples remain protected.
cinewolf.tooltip.position_smoothing_stre: Controls how strongly small position vibrations are reduced. 0 keeps the raw path; 1 applies the strongest smoothing.
cinewolf.tooltip.rotation_smoothing_stre: Controls how strongly the aim point is stabilized before yaw and pitch are recalculated. Higher values reduce rapid rotation jitter.
cinewolf.tooltip.smoothing_window: Centered time span in seconds used to evaluate neighboring samples. A wider window removes broader shake without adding forward-only delay.
cinewolf.tooltip.outlier_rejection: Replaces isolated position spikes that disagree with the local path. It does not interpolate across shot boundaries or target teleports.
cinewolf.tooltip.outlier_distance: Maximum positional deviation from the locally predicted path, in blocks, before a sample is treated as a sudden jump.
cinewolf.tooltip.outlier_speed: Minimum speed required on both sides of an out-and-back sample before it may be rejected. This is not a camera speed cap; sustained intentional movement is preserved.
cinewolf.tooltip.generate: Writes the exact current preview as editable native Flashback camera and FOV keyframes.
cinewolf.tooltip.generate_stale: Preview the current settings again. The target, replay time, settings, or timeline changed.
cinewolf.tooltip.reset_defaults: Restores the default parameters for the selected shot type.
cinewolf.tooltip.preview_path: Builds a non-destructive 3D preview using the current target, range, and camera settings.
cinewolf.tooltip.clear_preview: Removes the current CineWolf path preview without changing Flashback keyframes.
cinewolf.tooltip.preview_visible: Shows or hides the generated path in the replay world.
cinewolf.tooltip.undo: Restores the timeline state from before the most recent unchanged CineWolf shot.
cinewolf.tooltip.conflict_cancel: Closes the conflict dialog without changing any Flashback keyframes.
cinewolf.tooltip.conflict_add: Adds new CineWolf tracks and leaves every existing camera and FOV keyframe untouched.
cinewolf.tooltip.conflict_replace: Removes existing camera and FOV keyframes only inside the confirmed interval, then writes the CineWolf result.
cinewolf.preview.status.open_replay: Open a Flashback replay editor first.
cinewolf.preview.status.sample_limit: The preview exceeds the configured limit of %s samples.
cinewolf.preview.status.lookahead_sample: The preview plus look-ahead exceeds the configured limit of %s samples.
cinewolf.preview.status.target_unavailab: The target is unavailable at replay tick %s.
cinewolf.preview.status.planning: Planning and simplifying the camera path…
cinewolf.preview.status.generation_faile: Camera-path generation failed; see the log for technical details.
cinewolf.preview.status.invalid: The generated path is invalid; review the warnings below.
cinewolf.montage.range.required: Select a Flashback In/Out timeline range first.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preset: Applies a starting style for duration, pacing, framing, and movement. You can adjust every value afterwards.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.output_duration: Target duration of the finished montage in seconds.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.aspect_ratio: Selects horizontal or vertical framing rules and preview guides.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.automatic_targe: Lets CineWolf discover important replay entities when no fixed main target is selected.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.pacing: Controls the overall rhythm used when selecting shot lengths and transitions.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.movement_intens: Controls the size and energy of generated camera moves. It does not smooth camera shake.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.cut_frequency: Higher values favor more, shorter shots; lower values favor longer continuous shots.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.minimum_shot: Shortest duration allowed for an automatically planned shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.maximum_shot: Longest duration allowed for an automatically planned shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.event_sensitivi: Lower values accept subtler replay events; higher values keep only stronger events.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.advanced: Opens event categories, collision, smoothing, sampling, replay-speed, and diagnostic settings.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.include_markers: Allows Flashback replay markers to become montage events.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.include_combat: Includes detected combat, damage, and death events when planning shots.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.include_buildin: Includes grouped block placement and destruction events.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.include_vehicle: Includes entering, leaving, and moving with vehicles.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.include_flight: Includes flight start, sustained flight, descent, and landing events.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.speed_changes: Allows CineWolf to add native Flashback replay-speed keyframes when the preset calls for them.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.chronological: Prefers preserving the source replay order when several events compete for montage space.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.collision: Checks every generated camera sample against historical replay-world geometry before writing keyframes.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.coarse_rate: Initial replay samples per second used to find active regions. Higher values cost more analysis time.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.detailed_rate: Replay samples per second used around important events. Higher values improve detail but take longer.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.minimum_speed: Lowest replay playback speed CineWolf may plan when speed changes are enabled.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.maximum_speed: Highest replay playback speed CineWolf may plan when speed changes are enabled.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.safe_area: Fraction of the vertical frame in which CineWolf tries to keep the subject for 9:16 output.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.debug_json: Writes a diagnostic JSON snapshot after successful montage generation.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.save_project: Saves the current analysis, plan, and manual shot edits as a local CineWolf project.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.export_debug: Saves the project together with detailed diagnostic data for troubleshooting.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.analyze: Samples the selected Flashback range, detects events, and builds an editable montage plan.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.cancel_analysis: Stops the current analysis and restores the replay state from before sampling.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.clear_analysis: Removes the current analysis, plan, generated preview, and pending montage actions.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.regenerate_unlo: Rebuilds the plan while preserving shots marked as locked.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview: Generates camera paths and plays a non-destructive preview of the entire montage.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.generate: Generates the paths, checks conflicts, and writes editable native Flashback keyframes after confirmation.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.undo: Restores the Flashback timeline state from before the most recent unchanged CineWolf montage.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview_play: Plays the montage preview from its current output time.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview_pause: Pauses the montage preview at its current output time.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview_stop: Stops the montage preview and returns to its beginning.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview_previou: Jumps to the previous enabled montage shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview_next: Jumps to the next enabled montage shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.preview_exit: Exits montage preview mode without writing any keyframes.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.event_seek: Pauses the replay and seeks to this detected event for inspection.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_expand: Opens this planned shot to show its controls, source event, reasons, and warnings.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_enabled: Includes or excludes this shot without deleting it from the editable plan.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_locked: Protects this shot from replacement when unlocked shots are regenerated.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_up: Moves this shot one place earlier in the montage order.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_down: Moves this shot one place later in the montage order.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_duplicate: Creates an editable copy of this shot next to the original.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_remove: Removes this shot from the editable montage plan.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_replace_ty: Changes the camera generator while retaining this shot's source range and target.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_change_tar: Assigns another replay entity as the tracked subject of this shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_edit_param: Opens the detailed camera parameters for this individual shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.shot_preview: Generates paths if needed and opens the montage preview at this shot.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.conflict_add: Adds the montage as separate native tracks without deleting existing timeline content.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.conflict_replac: Replaces conflicting native camera, FOV, and replay-time keys only inside the confirmed montage interval.
cinewolf.montage.tooltip.conflict_after_: This placement mode is unavailable because Flashback camera tracks are bound to source replay time.
cinewolf.montage.status.finding_windows: Finding active windows for detailed sampling…
cinewolf.montage.status.replanned: Replanned %s shots; locked shots were preserved.
cinewolf.montage.status.plan_invalidated: The montage plan is stale and must be rebuilt.
cinewolf.montage.status.cancelled: Analysis cancelled and replay state restored.
cinewolf.montage.status.replay_closed: Replay closed; analysis resources were cleared.
cinewolf.montage.generation.idle: Camera paths have not been generated.
cinewolf.montage.preview.restoring: Exiting preview and restoring editor state…
cinewolf.montage.preview.no_mapping: No safe replay-time mapping for this frame.
cinewolf.montage.preview.already_active: Montage preview is already active or restoring.
cinewolf.montage.preview.shot_unavailabl: The selected shot is disabled or no longer available for preview.
cinewolf.montage.preview.fov_note: The in-memory preview applies camera position/rotation; final native FOV keyframes remain fully editable.
cinewolf.montage.shot.details: Score %s • target %s • %s s • replay speed %sx • %s • %s warning(s)
cinewolf.montage.conflict.title: Montage Timeline Conflict
cinewolf.montage.conflict.summary: The output interval intersects %s camera, %s FOV, %s replay-time keyframe(s), and %s active interpolation segment(s).
cinewolf.montage.conflict.default_cancel: Cancel is the default. Replace affects only the exact confirmed output interval; unrelated keys stay untouched.
cinewolf.montage.conflict.after_last_una: Unavailable for source-bound montages; choose Add or Replace.
cinewolf.montage.write.success: Montage generated: %s camera, %s FOV, %s replay-time keyframes.
cinewolf.montage.undo.success: The complete CineWolf montage transaction was undone.
cinewolf.montage.undo.unavailable: No unchanged CineWolf montage transaction is available to undo.
cinewolf.montage.project.debug_saved: Montage project and debug JSON saved locally.
cinewolf.montage.project.save_failed: Could not save the local montage project.
cinewolf.montage.settings.reanalyze_or_r: Settings changed. Analyze again, or regenerate the current plan where applicable.
cinewolf.montage.settings.scope_changed: The selected replay range or main target changed. Previous analysis was cleared.
cinewolf.montage.warning.path_review: A generated camera path needs review before export.
cinewolf.montage.error.open_replay: Open a Flashback replay editor first.
cinewolf.montage.error.select_range: Select a Flashback In/Out range first.
cinewolf.montage.error.select_target_or_: Select a main target or enable automatic target detection.
cinewolf.montage.error.sample_range_too_: The selected range is too short for safe analysis.
cinewolf.montage.error.plan_missing: Analyze the replay and create a montage plan first.
cinewolf.montage.error.plan_invalid: The montage plan has blocking errors. Review its warnings before generation.
cinewolf.montage.error.collision_incompl: Historical collision checking did not complete safely.
cinewolf.montage.error.preview_unavailab: Generate valid montage paths before previewing.
cinewolf.montage.error.timeline_write_fa: The atomic Flashback timeline write was rejected.
montage.reason.outro: Provides a visually strong final shot.
montage.reason.event_match: Shot type matches the detected event.
montage.reason.event_lead_in_or_out: The shot supplies lead-in or lead-out footage around the event peak.
montage.reason.duplicated: Shot was duplicated by the user.
montage.warning.flashback_requires_chron: Flashback 0.41.1 requires monotonically increasing source time; non-chronological ordering was constrained.
montage.warning.output_shortened_to_sour: The requested %s s output exceeds the selected source at the configured replay speed; the montage was shortened to %s s.
montage.warning.events_reused: Only %s distinct suitable event(s) were available for %s shots; alternate angles were used.
montage.warning.vertical_framing_risk: Wide or horizontal motion may leave the configured 9:16 safe area.
montage.warning.edited_source_not_monoto: Manual reordering made source time move backward. Reorder shots chronologically before generation.
analysis.no_samples_in_range: No safe replay samples were captured in the selected range.
analysis.no_events_detected: No event exceeded the configured thresholds.
analysis.no_targets_selected: No analyzable target was selected or discovered.
analysis.detector_unavailable: No detector is available for event type %s.
analysis.sample_limit_applied: The sample limit reduced %s samples to %s.
analysis.event_limit_applied: The event limit reduced %s events to %s.
analysis.target_limit_applied: The target limit reduced %s candidates to %s.
analysis.selected_target_not_observed: A selected target was not observed in the sampled range.
analysis.selected_target_limit_applied: Selected targets exceeded the configured target cap.
montage.timeline.source_cut_not_supporte: Flashback cannot represent an instant source-time cut; mappings must be continuous.
montage.timeline.source_cut_collapsed_to: A source-time transition collapsed to one output tick.
montage.timeline.mapping_speed_mismatch: A replay speed does not match its source/output endpoints.
montage.timeline.conflicts_cancelled: Generation was cancelled because timeline conflicts exist.
montage.timeline.replace_not_confirmed: Replacement requires confirmation of the exact output interval.
montage.timeline.replace_interval_mismat: The confirmed replacement interval no longer matches the montage.
montage.timeline.place_after_last_not_sa: No safe interval exists after the last relevant keyframe.
montage.timeline.place_after_last_overfl: Placing after the last keyframe would exceed the timeline.
montage.timeline.place_after_last_source: Placing after the last keyframe would move a source replay-time keyframe beyond the replay duration.
montage.timeline.camera_source_not_stric: Camera source replay ticks must increase strictly inside each shot.
montage.timeline.shots_source_overlap: Adjacent shots overlap in source replay time.
montage.timeline.hard_cut_boundary_too_t: A hard-cut boundary has too little source replay time for distinct editable keys.
montage.timeline.camera_source_tick_coll: Multiple camera keys collapse onto the same source replay tick.
montage.timeline.fov_source_tick_collisi: Multiple FOV keys collapse onto the same source replay tick.
montage.timeline.output_not_strictly_inc: Generated output keyframe ticks must increase strictly.
montage.timeline.keyframe_outside_source: A generated keyframe lies outside its shot's source replay interval.
montage.timeline.output_exceeds_replay: The output montage interval exceeds the replay timeline.
montage.timeline.source_exceeds_replay: A source replay-time keyframe exceeds the replay duration.
montage.timeline.keyframe_limit_exceeded: The montage exceeds the configured safe keyframe limit.
montage.timeline.atomic_write_rolled_bac: Flashback rejected part of the transaction; the previous scene was restored.
montage.timeline.flashback_state_unavail: The Flashback editor state is unavailable.
montage.timeline.client_thread_required: Timeline operations must run on the Minecraft client thread.
montage.timeline.camera_path_invalid: At least one generated camera path is invalid.
montage.timeline.shots_empty: No enabled generated shots are available.
montage.timeline.native_keyframe_prepara: Native Flashback keyframes could not be prepared safely.
montage.project.malformed: The montage project was malformed and quarantined.
montage.project.too_large: The montage project exceeded the safe local file limit.
montage.project.unsafe_file: The montage project path is unsafe.
montage.project.unsafe_id: The montage project identifier is invalid.
montage.project.quarantine_failed: The malformed montage project could not be quarantined.
montage.project.not_found: The requested local montage project was not found.
cinewolf.montage.error.generated_path_in: The generated camera path is invalid.
cinewolf.montage.preview.wait_restore: Wait for replay sampling or preview state to finish restoring, then try again.
cinewolf.path_warning.duration: Shot duration must be greater than zero.
cinewolf.path_warning.timeline: Source replay time must move forward.
cinewolf.path_warning.fov: FOV must be between 1 and 110 degrees.
cinewolf.path_warning.numeric: All shot parameters must be finite numbers.
cinewolf.path_warning.sample_limit: The path exceeds the configured safe sample limit.
cinewolf.path_warning.missing_target: The target is missing in part of the sampled source interval.
cinewolf.path_warning.invalid_target: The target pose is invalid in part of the sampled source interval.
cinewolf.path_warning.dimension_change: The target changes dimension inside this shot.
cinewolf.path_warning.non_finite_path: The generated path contains an invalid camera sample.
cinewolf.path_warning.keyframe_limit: The simplified path exceeds the safe keyframe limit.
cinewolf.path_warning.distance: Camera distance must be greater than zero.
cinewolf.path_warning.camera_speed: Camera speed must be greater than zero.
cinewolf.path_warning.safe_distance: Dolly distances must be at least one block.
cinewolf.path_warning.dolly_range: Dolly-in start distance must be greater than its end distance.
cinewolf.path_warning.camera_inside_targ: The camera would enter the target bounding box.
cinewolf.path_warning.diameter: Orbit diameter must be greater than zero.
cinewolf.path_warning.collision_unresolv: Collision avoidance could not clear %s camera sample(s); review them before export.
cinewolf.path_warning.vertical_framing_r: The tracked subject leaves the configured 9:16 safe area in %s camera sample(s).
cinewolf.path_warning.vertical_framing_u: The tracked subject was unavailable for 9:16 validation in %s camera sample(s).
cinewolf.path_warning.easing_baked: This easing has no exact native Flashback mapping, so CineWolf baked it into editable linear samples.
montage.mapping.empty: The montage has no replay-time mappings.
montage.mapping.invalid_output_duration: The configured montage output duration is invalid.
montage.mapping.invalid_speed_change: The adjacent replay-speed change bound is invalid.
montage.mapping.not_output_ordered: Replay-time mappings are not ordered by output time.
montage.mapping.output_duration_mismatch: Replay-time mappings do not cover the requested output duration.
montage.mapping.output_gap: A gap exists between output-time mappings.
montage.mapping.output_overlap: Replay-time mappings overlap in output time.
montage.mapping.output_starts_after_zero: Replay-time mapping starts after output time zero.
montage.mapping.source_not_monotonic: Source replay time moves backward between adjacent shots.
montage.mapping.speed_change_too_large: Replay speed changes too sharply between adjacent shots.
montage.mapping.speed_mismatch: A replay speed does not match its source and output interval.
montage.mapping.speed_out_of_bounds: A replay speed falls outside the configured bounds.
montage.timeline.request_missing: No montage timeline write request was provided.
montage.timeline.output_start_out_of_ran: The selected output start is outside Flashback's timeline range.
montage.timeline.invalid_keyframe_limit: The configured montage keyframe limit is invalid.
montage.timeline.shots_reordered: Generated shots were normalized into output-time order.
montage.timeline.shot_output_start_inval: A generated shot has an invalid output start.
montage.timeline.shot_requires_two_sampl: Each generated shot requires at least two camera samples.
montage.timeline.camera_sample_invalid: A generated camera sample is invalid.
montage.timeline.camera_samples_not_orde: Camera samples are not ordered by cinematic time.
montage.timeline.fov_out_of_range: A generated FOV is outside Flashback's safe range.
montage.timeline.shot_collapsed_to_one_t: A shot became shorter than two output ticks.
montage.timeline.camera_ticks_collapsed: Multiple camera samples quantized to the same Flashback tick.
montage.timeline.shots_overlap: Generated camera shots overlap in output time.
montage.timeline.shot_output_gap: A gap exists between generated camera shots.
montage.timeline.camera_starts_after_out: The first camera shot starts after montage output time zero.
montage.timeline.mappings_not_ordered: Replay-time mappings are not ordered by output time.
montage.timeline.mapping_must_start_at_z: Replay-time mapping must begin at montage output time zero.
montage.timeline.source_time_out_of_rang: A source replay time is outside Flashback's supported range.
montage.timeline.timelapse_requires_two_: Replay-time control requires at least two keyframes.
montage.timeline.camera_exceeds_time_map: Camera output extends beyond the replay-time mapping.
montage.timeline.output_interval_too_sho: The montage output interval is shorter than one tick.
montage.timeline.camera_requires_two_poi: The montage requires at least two camera keyframes.
montage.timeline.fov_requires_two_points: The montage requires at least two FOV keyframes.
montage.timeline.keyframe_outside_output: A generated keyframe lies outside the montage output interval.
montage.timeline.output_time_out_of_rang: A generated output time exceeds Flashback's supported range.
montage.timeline.conflicts_preserved: Existing keyframes were preserved while adding the montage.
montage.timeline.placed_after_last: The montage was placed after the last relevant keyframe.
